creator: m.tsatsenko@gmail.com
text:
java/icedtea-web can be built with openjdk7, but it is unusable:

/usr/local/bin/itweb-javaws
Error: could not find libjava.so
Error: Could not find Java SE Runtime Environment.

Fix: 

Not known sorry, just use openjdk6 if you need javaws
How-To-Repeat: - install java/openjdk7
- install java/icedtea-web
- Try to run itweb-javaws
